untranslatable_reason: Exact pattern structure (left shoulder, head, right shoulder with neckline) cannot be fully expressed with available point-in-time indicators. Pattern requires multi-bar structure recognition and neckline level calculation which are not available. Conversion uses breakout below dc_lower as proxy for neckline breach, combined with prior strength (price_pos_20 > 0.7) and declining highs, but lacks true shoulder/head topology validation.
